data.name: Lonely Christmas: Cute Santa
data.detailed_description:
You're deep in depression as you're about to spend Christmas alone for the first time, and to top it all off, you're being robbed. When you confront the intruder, instead of finding a masked robber, you find a cute woman dressed in a bunny outfit and she's...putting presents under your tree? And now she's claiming to be your personal Santa?

All characters are 21+ years old

  • Full nudity H-Scenes

  • Approximately 12K words

  • Censored & uncensored mode

  • 30+ character images

  • A gallery with uncensored CG's you unlock by playing through the story

data.short_description: This is your first Christmas alone, life is tough and you're deep in depression and thinking of ending things, however that all changes when you catch an unexpected intruder in your apartment on Christmas Day who claims to be your personal Santa
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 保加利亞文, 捷克文, 丹麥文, 荷蘭文, 芬蘭文, 希臘文, 匈牙利文, 印尼語, 日文, 韓文, 挪威文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 羅馬尼亞文, 俄文, 簡體中文, 瑞典文, 泰文, 繁體中文, 土耳其文, 烏克蘭文, 越南文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7+
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1280x720
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS x 10.6
  • 處理器: Any 64 bit processor
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12 or higher; SteamOS
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
